svg.content: <mxGraphModel> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="group_local" value="Local Dev (Standalone)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="300" height="200" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <object id="l_sandbox" label="Sandbox JVM"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="group_local"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="60" width="100" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="l_engine" label="Engine Binary"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="group_local"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="60" width="100" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="le" value="/tmp/iceberg.sock" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="group_local" source="l_sandbox" target="l_engine"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="group_k8s" value="Kubernetes (Pod)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="40" width="300" height="200" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <object id="k_sandbox" label="Sandbox Container"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="group_k8s"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="60" width="100" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="k_engine" label="Engine Container"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="group_k8s"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="60" width="100" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="ke" value="/var/run/app/<br>iceberg.sock" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="group_k8s" source="k_sandbox" target="k_engine"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <object id="k_vol" label="shared emptyDir"> <mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="group_k8s"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="120" width="80" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="ke2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="group_k8s" source="k_sandbox" target="k_vol"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ke3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="group_k8s" source="k_engine" target="k_vol"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
